seoTitle: How to Change the Font in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to update the font used in your Freshdesk help desk so your support portal and emails match your brand's look and feel.
intro: Your Freshdesk portal and email templates should reflect your brand, and that starts with typography. This guide covers where to go inside Freshdesk to update the font used across your customer-facing pages.

steps.heading: Go to admin settings
steps.body: Log in to Freshdesk as an administrator and open the admin panel where portal and theme settings live.

steps.heading: Find the theme or portal customization section
steps.body: Locate the section for customizing your support portal's appearance, where font and styling options are typically grouped with colors and layout.

steps.heading: Select or update the font
steps.body: Choose a new font from the available options, or enter custom font settings if your plan supports advanced CSS customization.

steps.heading: Preview and save your changes
steps.body: Preview the portal to confirm the new font displays correctly across pages before saving and publishing the change.

faq.question: Can I use any font in Freshdesk?
faq.answer: Freshdesk offers a set of built-in font options, and higher-tier plans may allow custom CSS for more font flexibility.

faq.question: Will changing the font affect existing tickets?
faq.answer: Font changes apply to the portal and templates going forward and do not alter the content of previously submitted tickets.

faq.question: Do I need admin access to change the font?
faq.answer: Yes, portal customization settings including fonts are restricted to admin-level accounts.

faq.question: Can I preview the font change before publishing?
faq.answer: Yes, Freshdesk typically lets you preview theme changes before making them live to customers.
